COPY.title: Copy
COPY_TOKEN.title: Mirror Image
COPY_TOKEN.description: While you have mirror images, the first card you play each turn adds a 0-cost [gold]Ethereal[/gold] [gold]Exhaust[/gold] copy of itself to your hand for each mirror image. When you take unblocked damage, all mirror images die.
FIRST_MOVE.title: First Move
FIRST_MOVE.description: Triggers only if this is the first card you play this turn.
REVERSAL_ILLUSIONIST.title: Reversal
REVERSAL_ILLUSIONIST.description:
If the enemy's intent includes attack, change it into gaining [gold]Block[/gold] equal to the damage it would have dealt.
If this card would have [gold]Ethereal[/gold], it gains [gold]Retain[/gold] instead.
COUNTER_ILLUSIONIST.title: Counter
COUNTER_ILLUSIONIST.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Add this enemy's attack intent damage to this card.
BLIND_ILLUSIONIST.title: Blind
BLIND_ILLUSIONIST.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If the enemy intends to attack, apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] and gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
FORESIGHT_ILLUSIONIST.title: Foresight
FORESIGHT_ILLUSIONIST.description:
Choose up to 8 cards from your draw pile and place them on top in any order.
Gain 1 [img=32]res://illusionist/art/illusionist_energy_icon.webp[/img] next turn.
FORESIGHT_ILLUSIONIST.selectionScreenPro: Choose cards to place on top of your draw pile.
MIRROR_IMAGE_ILLUSIONIST.title: Mirror Image
RIPOSTE_ILLUSIONIST.title: Riposte
RIPOSTE_ILLUSIONIST.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If the enemy intends to attack, deal {Bonus:diff()} extra damage.
[gold]Transmute[/gold] this card into its upgraded version.
PHANTOM_VENOM_ILLUSIONIST.title: Phantom Venom
PHANTOM_VENOM_ILLUSIONIST.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Add a Phantom Venom [gold]Transmuted[/gold] into a [gold]Toxic[/gold] to your discard pile.
DISRUPT_ILLUSIONIST.title: Disrupt
DISRUPT_ILLUSIONIST.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold].
If you have no mirror images, [gold]Copy[/gold] 1.
OBSCURE_ILLUSIONIST.title: Obscure
OBSCURE_ILLUSIONIST.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Draw 2 cards.
If the enemy intends to attack, gain {ExtraBlock:diff()} extra [gold]Block[/gold].
DETONATE_ILLUSIONIST.title: Detonate
DETONATE_ILLUSIONIST.description:
Destroy all [gold]mirror images[/gold].
For each one destroyed, deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
SIPHON_ILLUSIONIST.title: Siphon
SIPHON_ILLUSIONIST.description:
Destroy all [gold]mirror images[/gold].
For each one destroyed, gain 1 [gold]Strength[/gold] and 1 [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
ILLUSIONIST_STRIKE_ILLUSIONIST.title: Strike
ILLUSIONIST_DEFEND_ILLUSIONIST.title: Defend
KINDLE_ILLUSIONIST.title: Kindle
KINDLE_ILLUSIONIST.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
[gold]Transmute[/gold] every Status card in your hand into a [gold]Dim Lamp[/gold].
DIM_LAMP_ILLUSIONIST.title: Dim Lamp
EXTINGUISHED_LAMP_ILLUSIONIST.title: Extinguished Lamp
SUMMON_ILLUSIONIST.title: Summon
SUMMON_ILLUSIONIST.description: Choose a non-Power card in your draw pile. Add a Toxic to your hand, [gold]Transmuted[/gold] into that card.
SUMMON_ILLUSIONIST.selectionScreenPrompt: Choose a non-Power card to summon a copy of.
IMPROVISE_ILLUSIONIST.title: Improvise
IMPROVISE_ILLUSIONIST.description: The first time you transform a card each turn, play it at a random enemy.
SILVER_LINING_ILLUSIONIST.title: Silver Lining
SILVER_LINING_ILLUSIONIST.description:
Gain 1 [img=32]res://illusionist/art/illusionist_energy_icon.webp[/img].
If the enemy has a negative effect, gain 1 [img=32]res://illusionist/art/illusionist_energy_icon.webp[/img].
MEMORY_ILLUSIONIST.title: Memory
MEMORY_ILLUSIONIST.description: Whenever a [gold]mirror image[/gold] is destroyed, draw 2 cards and gain 1 [img=32]res://illusionist/art/illusionist_energy_icon.webp[/img].
AMBUSH_ILLUSIONIST.title: Ambush
ECHO_ILLUSIONIST.title: Echo
ECHO_ILLUSIONIST.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Put a copy of this card into your discard pile, played 1 extra time.
CONSCRIPT_ILLUSIONIST.title: Conscript
HEAVY_SLASH_ILLUSIONIST.title: Heavy Slash
FATE_LOOM_ILLUSIONIST.title: Fate Loom
FATE_LOOM_ILLUSIONIST.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Put a card from your discard pile on top of your draw pile.
FATE_LOOM_ILLUSIONIST.selectionScreenPro: Choose a card to put on top of your draw pile.
RESHAPE_ILLUSIONIST.title: Reshape
RESHAPE_ILLUSIONIST.description: A card in your hand gains [gold]Replay[/gold].
RESHAPE_ILLUSIONIST.selectionScreenPromp: Choose a card to gain Replay.
FLICKER_ILLUSIONIST.title: Flicker
FLICKER_ILLUSIONIST.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Gain {Block:diff()} Block for each enemy with an Attack intent.
KALEIDOSCOPE_ILLUSIONIST.title: Kaleidoscope
KALEIDOSCOPE_ILLUSIONIST.description: Every 5 cards you play, [gold]Copy[/gold] 1 and deal 6 damage to ALL enemies.
DAZE_ILLUSIONIST.title: Daze
DAZE_ILLUSIONIST.description:
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
[gold]First Move[/gold]: draw 1 extra card.
LAST_STAND_ILLUSIONIST.title: Last Stand
LAST_STAND_ILLUSIONIST.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
If you have no [gold]mirror images[/gold], gain {ExtraBlock:diff()} extra [gold]Block[/gold] and [gold]Copy[/gold] 2.
PHASE_SHIFT_ILLUSIONIST.title: Phase Shift
PHASE_SHIFT_ILLUSIONIST.description: The next time you would take unblocked damage, your [gold]mirror images[/gold] are not destroyed.
DISILLUSION_ILLUSIONIST.title: Disillusion
DISILLUSION_ILLUSIONIST.description: Choose {Cards:diff()} cards in your hand and [gold]Transmute[/gold] them into [gold]Dim Lamps[/gold].
DISILLUSION_ILLUSIONIST.selectionScreenP: Choose cards to transmute into Dim Lamps.
DAZZLE_ILLUSIONIST.title: Dazzle
DAZZLE_ILLUSIONIST.description: At the start of your turn, gain 4 [gold]Block[/gold] for each [gold]mirror image[/gold] you have.
UNVEIL_ILLUSIONIST.title: Unveil
SIEGE_ILLUSIONIST.title: Siege
SIEGE_ILLUSIONIST.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies for each [gold]mirror image[/gold] you have.
CRESCENDO_ILLUSIONIST.title: Crescendo
CRESCENDO_ILLUSIONIST.description:
Lose 4 [gold]Strength[/gold].
At the start of each turn, gain 2 [gold]Strength[/gold].
PHANTASM_STORM_ILLUSIONIST.title: Phantasm Storm
PHANTASM_STORM_ILLUSIONIST.description:
For each [gold]mirror image[/gold] you have, deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
[gold]Copy[/gold] 3. If you have no mirror images, [gold]Copy[/gold] 2 more.
SABOTAGE_ILLUSIONIST.title: Illusionist's Wrath
SABOTAGE_ILLUSIONIST.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Deal extra damage to each enemy equal to its attack intent.
[gold]Transmute[/gold] a card in your hand into a copy of this card.
FEINT_ILLUSIONIST.title: Feint
FEINT_ILLUSIONIST.description: If the target intends to attack, [gold]Stun[/gold] it.
AGING_ILLUSIONIST.title: Catalyze
AGING_ILLUSIONIST.description:
Double your damage this turn.
If the target's intent is only [gold]Attack[/gold] and/or [gold]Block[/gold], advance it to next turn's intent, discarding the current one.
PROVOKE_ILLUSIONIST.title: Provoke
PROVOKE_ILLUSIONIST.description:
Gain {DexterityPower:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
If the enemy's intent includes attack, give it {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
REKINDLE_ILLUSIONIST.title: Rekindle
REKINDLE_ILLUSIONIST.description:
{IfUpgraded:show:|Gain 1 [gold]Frail[/gold].
}At the start of your next turn, [gold]Copy[/gold] 1.
ENCORE_ILLUSIONIST.title: Encore
ENCORE_ILLUSIONIST.description: At the end of your turn, return a random card with [gold]Retain[/gold] from your discard pile to your hand.
TRANSMUTE_ILLUSIONIST.title: Transmute
TRANSMUTE_ILLUSIONIST.description: Choose 1 of {Cards:diff()} random cards from your exhaust pile, then [gold]Transmute[/gold] a card in your hand into it.
TRANSMUTE_ILLUSIONIST.selectionScreenPro: Choose a card from your exhaust pile.
TRANSMUTE_TIP.title: Transmute
TRANSMUTE_TIP.description: [gold]Transform[/gold] a card. At the start of your next turn, [gold]transform[/gold] it into what it was before that [gold]transform[/gold].
FLUXWEAVE_ILLUSIONIST.title: Fluxweave
FLUXWEAVE_ILLUSIONIST.description: For every 2 cards you transform, draw 1 card.
SHIFTING_BLADE_ILLUSIONIST.title: Shifting Blade
SHIFTING_BLADE_ILLUSIONIST.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Transmute[/gold] a card in your hand into a copy of this card.
MIRROR_WARD_ILLUSIONIST.title: Mirror Ward
MIRROR_WARD_ILLUSIONIST.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
[gold]Transmute[/gold] a card in your hand into a copy of this card.
MYRIAD_FACES_ILLUSIONIST.title: Myriad Faces
MYRIAD_FACES_ILLUSIONIST.description: Choose a card in your hand. [gold]Transmute[/gold] every other card in your hand into a copy of it. Add that many Extinguished Lamps to your draw pile.
METAMORPHOSIS_ILLUSIONIST.title: Metamorphosis
METAMORPHOSIS_ILLUSIONIST.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Deal {Bonus:diff()} additional damage for each card you transformed this turn.
CHANNEL_ILLUSIONIST.title: Channel
RECKONING_ILLUSIONIST.title: Reckoning
RECKONING_ILLUSIONIST.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Deal {Bonus:diff()} additional damage for each card mentioning an enemy's intent you have played this combat.
MOMENTUM_ILLUSIONIST.title: Momentum
MOMENTUM_ILLUSIONIST.description: For every 10 cards transformed or [gold]Exhausted[/gold] this combat, draw 1 card and gain 1 [img=32]res://illusionist/art/illusionist_energy_icon.webp[/img].
FOREWARN_ILLUSIONIST.title: Forewarn
FOREWARN_ILLUSIONIST.description:
Put a [gold]Prescience[/gold] into your hand whose [gold]Block[/gold] equals the target's current attack-intent damage.{IfUpgraded:show:
Prescience gains 10 extra Block.}
PRESCIENCE_ILLUSIONIST.title: Prescience
ACCRUE_ILLUSIONIST.title: Accrue
ACCRUE_ILLUSIONIST.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
At the start of your turn, if this is in your hand, DOUBLE its damage.
SACRIFICE_ILLUSIONIST.title: Sacrifice
SACRIFICE_ILLUSIONIST.description:
Gain 1 [img=32]res://illusionist/art/illusionist_energy_icon.webp[/img].
Draw {Cards:diff()} card(s).
If you have a [gold]mirror image[/gold], destroy one.
EXTRACT_ILLUSIONIST.title: Extract
EXTRACT_ILLUSIONIST.description:
Destroy all [gold]mirror images[/gold].
Gain 1 [img=32]res://illusionist/art/illusionist_energy_icon.webp[/img] at the start of each turn.
SHIFTING_WAVE_ILLUSIONIST.title: Shifting Wave
SHIFTING_WAVE_ILLUSIONIST.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
[gold]Transmute[/gold] every Shifting Wave in all piles this combat into its upgraded form.
